x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Service-to-CI associations are the data foundation for Now Assist ITOM impact analysis. Low association counts mean Now Assist cannot determine which CIs support which services.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Map business services to CIs via svc_ci_assoc_list.do or by running Service Mapping. Ensure all business-critical services have CI associations. Without service-to-CI associations, Now Assist ITOM cannot determine which services are affected during incident response.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_f6f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c01
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Service-to-CI associations are the data foundation for Now Assist ITOM impact analysis. Low association counts mean Now Assist cannot determine which CIs support which services.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Service-to-CI Relationship Coverage</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('svc_ci_assoc');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' service-to-CI associations defined';

    if (count >= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' service-to-CI associations. Now Assist ITOM can accurately determine which services are affected by CI-level incidents.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' service-to-CI associations (target: 100+). Now Assist ITOM impact analysis will be limited to services with defined CI associations.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Fewer than 10 service-to-CI associations. Without these, Now Assist ITOM cannot determine which services are affected by CI events during incident response.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITOM</module><number>CHK0000367</number><order>140</order><remediation_guidance>Map business services to CIs via svc_ci_assoc_list.do or by running Service Mapping. Ensure all business-critical services have CI associations. Without service-to-CI associations, Now Assist ITOM cannot determine which services are affected during incident response.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>f6f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c01</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Service-to-CI Relationship Coverage</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_f6f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c01</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
